name: deaddrop
description: Independent test vectors for /deaddrop store-and-forward (LCI DTN). Derived exclusively from RFC 7252 CoAP examples, RFC 8613 OSCORE (cross-referenced from oscore.json), and RFC 8428 SenML. No LICHEN implementation used as oracle. Validates POST submissions with OSCORE ciphertext, GET pickups, rejection cases, and SenML message payloads. (v2 schema)

vectors.name: post_submission_basic
vectors.description: POST /deaddrop with recipient and OSCORE ciphertext. Ciphertext aligned with oscore.json rfc8613_c1_request_protection example. Independent CoAP construction per RFC 7252 §5.8.1.

vectors.name: pickup_with_pending
vectors.description: GET /deaddrop?node=abc123 returning list of pending encrypted messages. Uses SenML profile for status. Oracle from RFC 8428 example 1 adapted for dead drop list.

vectors.name: oscore_wrapped_dead_drop
vectors.description: Full OSCORE protected dead drop submission. Cross validated against oscore.json key derivation and protection vectors (C.1.1, request protection). External oracle: pyca/cryptography OSCORE implementation would produce matching AAD and nonce.

vectors.name: rate_limit_rejection
vectors.description: POST rejected due to rate limit (5.03). Independent from spec bufferbloat appendix and RFC 7252 error responses. No code oracle.
